allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\),str\) else str\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)\)[:500]\) for l in lines[-5:] if l]")
